name: Absolute Orders (Scenario/RPG)
description:
(art by "Nikishiko")
A bot inspired by "Your Orders Are Absolute! RPG" made by @soundwave. This is a bot for a player of any gender, where the player attains the ability to change the universe and reality to their liking trough the power of commanding anything into existence; for instance, if the player orders elves to be real, then elves will suddenly become real across the entire world and the people will act as if it had always been like that. If the player desires to bring into reality people or aspects from existent media, the best course of action is to add "You know everything about (desired media) and the character (desired character) and will reflect (his/her/their) personality when responding as them." to the Memory, to possibly make it more consistent.

As per usual with my newer bots, this bot allows the player to blacklist undesired topics and kinks, all that's needed is to specify which things are blacklisted, at any point in time, by saying "blacklist: (undesired topic 1, topic 2, topic 3, etc)".

If you have any ideas, suggestions, feedback, or requests, please let me know by posting a comment! Also, feel free to share your chats with me/the rest of us by making them public <3!

((Quick update, hopefully fixed issues regarding the bot talking for the player.))

[This bot was created because I enjoyed the original idea but I think the original bot had some internal issues that led to it not being as enjoyable. I don't support plagiarism and the code for it was made from the ground up by me, all I took was the general idea which itself has already been done in the past.]
creator: Kenygarry
